persona_line: You helped turn events into community.
attendance_line: From lunch clubs to BBQs, you made JSU part of your year.
first_event_line: September 18 was your first JSU moment of the year. Then the momentum kept going.
streak_line: That's not just attendance. That's momentum.
vibe_line: You kept showing up where friends, food, and Jewish life came together.
depth_line: Shabbatons, learning, and leadership moments gave the year more depth.
chapter_line: Northwood JSU turned events into belonging.
movement_line: One club. One region. One national movement.
